---
name: ⚙️ Frontend Feature / Technical Implementation
about: Propose a frontend feature, UI change, refactor, or architectural enhancement.
title: 'feature: '
labels: frontend, technical-debt, internal-feature
assignees: ''
---

### 1. Summary

- What problem are we solving?
- Who is affected by this change?

### 2. User story & acceptance criteria

- As a [type of user], I want [feature] so that [benefit].
- Acceptance criteria:
  - [ ] ...
  - [ ] ...

### 3. Design / UX

- Mockups / designs / Figma links:
- Responsive/mobile behavior:
- Accessibility requirements (keyboard, screen reader, contrast):
- Animation / motion expectations (if applicable):

### 4. Implementation

- Modified components/pages:
- New components/hooks/utilities:
- Data flow / API changes:
- State management approach:
- Design system or theme impact:

### 5. Performance & experience

- Load time or rendering impact:
- Browser support considerations:
- Any client-side performance risks:

### 6. Testing

- Unit tests:
- Integration tests:
- End-to-end tests:
- Visual regression / snapshot tests:
- Accessibility checks:

### 7. Rollout & deployment

- Feature flag?
- Backwards compatible?
- Rollback plan:

### 8. Dependencies / blockers

- Design:
- Backend / API:
- QA / testing:
- Other teams:

### 9. Open questions

- What decisions still need to be made?
- What choices need follow-up with product or design?
